name: ames-sprout
description: Sprout Social MCP connector for analytics, inbox messages, social listening, publishing, media uploads, and support cases.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to Sprout Social.
interface.longDescription: A Sprout Social MCP connector for analytics, inbox messages, social listening, content publishing, media uploads, support cases, metadata, and related social media workflows. Supports SPROUT_API_TOKEN or OAuth client credentials.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a publishing report from Sprout.
